title: Public Key Certification Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of obtaining and validating a digital certificate for public key encryption.
relationships: User generates a key pair and submits public key to RA for identity verification
RA validates identity and forwards request to CA
CA issues a digitally signed certificate binding the public key to the user's identity
Certificate is published to PKI directories
Other users verify the certificate's validity using the CA's public key from their Trusted Root Store
